purpose: Used for fever and mild to moderate pain relief.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Avoid overdose.
side_effects: Nausea, stomach discomfort, allergic rash, or liver injury in overdose.
warnings: Avoid overdose. Do not combine multiple paracetamol/acetaminophen medicines without advice. Use carefully in liver disease.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to paracetamol or if severe liver disease is present.

purpose: Used for fever and mild to moderate pain relief.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Avoid overdose.
side_effects: Nausea, stomach discomfort, allergic rash, or liver injury in overdose.
warnings: Avoid overdose. Do not combine with other paracetamol medicines without advice. Use carefully in liver disease.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to paracetamol or if severe liver disease is present.

purpose: Used for fever and mild to moderate pain relief.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Avoid overdose.
side_effects: Nausea, stomach discomfort, allergic rash, or liver injury in overdose.
warnings: Avoid overdose. Use carefully in liver disease and alcohol use.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to paracetamol or if severe liver disease is present.

purpose: Used for fever and mild to moderate pain relief.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Avoid overdose.
side_effects: Nausea, stomach discomfort, allergic rash, or liver injury in overdose.
warnings: Avoid overdose and duplicate paracetamol medicines.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to paracetamol or if severe liver disease is present.

purpose: Used for pain, fever, inflammation, body pain, and headache.
side_effects: Stomach pain, acidity, nausea, dizziness, or increased bleeding risk.
warnings: Use carefully in acidity, kidney disease, heart disease, high BP, asthma, or blood thinner use.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to NSAIDs or history of severe stomach ulcer/bleeding.

purpose: Used for pain, fever, inflammation, and body pain.
side_effects: Stomach pain, acidity, nausea, dizziness, or increased bleeding risk.
warnings: Use carefully in kidney disease, heart disease, acidity, asthma, or BP problems.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to ibuprofen or NSAIDs.

purpose: Used for pain and inflammation such as muscle pain, joint pain, and injury pain.
side_effects: Acidity, stomach pain, nausea, dizziness, swelling, or increased BP.
warnings: Use carefully in kidney, liver, heart disease, BP problems, or stomach ulcer history.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to diclofenac or NSAIDs.

purpose: Used for pain and inflammation such as joint pain, dental pain, and body pain.
side_effects: Acidity, nausea, stomach pain, dizziness, or diarrhea.
warnings: Use carefully in kidney, liver, heart disease, acidity, or ulcer history.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to aceclofenac or NSAIDs.

purpose: Used for pain, inflammation, menstrual cramps, and joint pain.
side_effects: Stomach pain, acidity, nausea, dizziness, or swelling.
warnings: Use carefully in kidney, liver, heart disease, BP problems, or ulcer history.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to naproxen or NSAIDs.

purpose: Used for pain relief and sometimes for heart-related antiplatelet treatment when prescribed.
side_effects: Acidity, stomach irritation, bleeding risk, nausea, or allergy.
warnings: Do not self-use for heart prevention. Use carefully with blood thinners or ulcer history.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to aspirin/NSAIDs or active bleeding/stomach ulcer.

purpose: Used for pain and menstrual cramps when prescribed.
side_effects: Stomach pain, acidity, nausea, diarrhea, or dizziness.
warnings: Use carefully in kidney disease, liver disease, asthma, or ulcer history.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to mefenamic acid or NSAIDs.

purpose: Prescription antibiotic used for certain bacterial infections.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed by the doctor.
side_effects: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, stomach pain, headache, or rash.
warnings: Do not use without prescription. Antibiotics are not useful for viral infections. Complete course only as advised by doctor.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to azithromycin or macrolide antibiotics.

purpose: Antibiotic used for bacterial infections when prescribed.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Complete the full course.
side_effects: Nausea, diarrhea, stomach pain, vomiting, headache, or rash.
warnings: Do not self-use antibiotics. Complete the course. Use carefully in liver disease or heart rhythm problems.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to azithromycin or macrolide antibiotics.

purpose: Antibiotic used for bacterial infections when prescribed.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Complete the full course.
side_effects: Nausea, diarrhea, stomach pain, vomiting, headache, or rash.
warnings: Do not self-use antibiotics. Complete the course even if symptoms improve.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to azithromycin or macrolide antibiotics.

purpose: Antibiotic used for bacterial infections when prescribed.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Complete the full course.
side_effects: Nausea, diarrhea, rash, stomach discomfort, or allergy.
warnings: Do not self-use antibiotics. Inform doctor about penicillin allergy.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to amoxicillin, penicillin, or similar antibiotics.

purpose: Antibiotic combination used for bacterial infections when prescribed.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Complete the full course.
side_effects: Diarrhea, nausea, stomach pain, rash, or yeast infection.
warnings: Do not self-use antibiotics. Use carefully in liver disease or allergy history.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to penicillin antibiotics or clavulanate.

purpose: Cephalosporin antibiotic used for bacterial infections when prescribed.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Complete the full course.
side_effects: Diarrhea, nausea, stomach pain, headache, or rash.
warnings: Do not self-use antibiotics. Inform doctor about cephalosporin or penicillin allergy.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to cefixime or cephalosporin antibiotics.

purpose: Cephalosporin antibiotic used for bacterial infections when prescribed.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Complete the full course.
side_effects: Diarrhea, nausea, stomach discomfort, headache, or rash.
warnings: Do not self-use antibiotics. Use carefully if allergic to beta-lactam antibiotics.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to cefuroxime or cephalosporins.

purpose: Antibiotic used for certain bacterial infections when prescribed.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Complete the full course.
side_effects: Diarrhea, nausea, stomach pain, dizziness, or rash.
warnings: Do not self-use antibiotics. Antibiotics do not work for viral cold/flu.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to cephalexin or cephalosporins.

purpose: Antibiotic used for bacterial infections, acne, and certain tick-borne infections when prescribed.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Complete the full course.
side_effects: Nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, acidity, sunlight sensitivity, or rash.
warnings: Avoid unnecessary sun exposure. Do not self-use antibiotics.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to doxycycline/tetracyclines. Use in pregnancy/children only with doctor advice.

purpose: Used for certain bacterial and protozoal infections when prescribed.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Complete the full course.
side_effects: Metallic taste, nausea, stomach pain, headache, or dizziness.
warnings: Avoid alcohol during treatment and for the advised period after treatment.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to metronidazole or similar medicines.

purpose: Antibiotic used for certain bacterial infections when prescribed.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Complete the full course.
side_effects: Nausea, diarrhea, dizziness, headache, tendon pain, or rash.
warnings: Use carefully in tendon problems, heart rhythm issues, seizures, pregnancy, or elderly patients.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to ciprofloxacin or fluoroquinolone antibiotics.

purpose: Antibiotic used for certain bacterial infections when prescribed.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Complete the full course.
side_effects: Nausea, diarrhea, dizziness, headache, tendon pain, or rash.
warnings: Use carefully in tendon problems, heart rhythm issues, seizures, or elderly patients.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to levofloxacin or fluoroquinolone antibiotics.

purpose: Antibiotic used for certain bacterial infections when prescribed.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Complete the full course.
side_effects: Nausea, diarrhea, dizziness, headache, or tendon pain.
warnings: Use carefully in tendon problems, seizures, heart rhythm issues, or elderly patients.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to ofloxacin or fluoroquinolones.

purpose: Antibiotic used for certain bacterial infections when prescribed.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed. Complete the full course.
side_effects: Nausea, diarrhea, dizziness, headache, or stomach discomfort.
warnings: Use carefully in kidney disease, tendon problems, seizures, or heart rhythm issues.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to norfloxacin or fluoroquinolones.

purpose: Used for allergy symptoms such as sneezing, runny nose, itching, and watery eyes.
side_effects: Drowsiness, dry mouth, tiredness, dizziness, or headache.
warnings: May cause sleepiness. Avoid driving if drowsy.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to cetirizine or similar antihistamines.

purpose: Used for allergy symptoms such as sneezing, runny nose, itching, and watery eyes.
side_effects: Drowsiness, dry mouth, tiredness, dizziness, or headache.
warnings: May cause sleepiness. Avoid driving if drowsy.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to cetirizine.

purpose: Used for allergy symptoms and hives.
side_effects: Sleepiness, tiredness, dry mouth, headache, or dizziness.
warnings: May cause sleepiness. Use carefully in kidney disease. Avoid driving if drowsy.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to levocetirizine or cetirizine.

purpose: Used for allergy symptoms and hives.
side_effects: Headache, dizziness, nausea, or tiredness.
warnings: Avoid taking with fruit juice if advised because it may reduce absorption.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to fexofenadine.

purpose: Used for allergy symptoms such as sneezing, runny nose, itching, and hives.
side_effects: Headache, sleepiness, dry mouth, or tiredness.
warnings: Use carefully in liver disease. Avoid driving if sleepy.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to loratadine.

purpose: Used for allergy symptoms, cold-related sneezing, and runny nose.
side_effects: Drowsiness, dry mouth, blurred vision, constipation, or dizziness.
warnings: May cause strong sleepiness. Avoid driving or alcohol.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic or if advised against in glaucoma, urinary retention, or prostate problems.

purpose: Used for asthma/allergy-related symptoms when prescribed.
side_effects: Headache, stomach pain, cough, tiredness, or mood changes.
warnings: Report mood changes, sleep disturbance, depression, or unusual behavior to doctor.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to montelukast.

purpose: Used for allergy-related symptoms and allergic rhinitis when prescribed.
side_effects: Headache, dry mouth, drowsiness, dizziness, nausea, or stomach discomfort.
warnings: May cause sleepiness. Use carefully in liver disease, kidney disease, asthma, pregnancy, or breastfeeding.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to ebastine, montelukast, or similar medicines.

purpose: Used for cough with mucus and allergy symptoms such as sneezing, runny nose, watery eyes, cough, and congestion.
side_effects: Sleepiness, dry mouth, dizziness, headache, diarrhea, nausea, or tiredness.
warnings: May cause drowsiness. Avoid driving if sleepy. Use carefully in liver or kidney disease.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to ambroxol, cetirizine, or similar medicines.

purpose: Used for acidity, acid reflux, gastritis, and stomach protection.
common_frequency: Usually taken before food if advised by doctor.
side_effects: Headache, nausea, abdominal pain, diarrhea, or gas.
warnings: Long-term use should be monitored by a doctor.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to pantoprazole.

purpose: Used for acidity, acid reflux, gastritis, and stomach protection.
common_frequency: Usually taken before food if advised by doctor.
side_effects: Headache, nausea, abdominal pain, diarrhea, or gas.
warnings: Long-term use should be monitored by a doctor.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to pantoprazole.

purpose: Used for acidity, acid reflux, GERD, and gastritis.
common_frequency: Usually taken before food if advised by doctor.
side_effects: Headache, abdominal pain, nausea, diarrhea, or gas.
warnings: Long-term use should be monitored by a doctor.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to omeprazole.

purpose: Used for acidity, acid reflux, GERD, and gastritis.
common_frequency: Usually taken before food if advised by doctor.
side_effects: Headache, abdominal pain, nausea, diarrhea, or gas.
warnings: Long-term use should be monitored by a doctor.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to omeprazole.

purpose: Used for acidity, acid reflux, gastritis, and stomach ulcer-related conditions.
common_frequency: Usually taken before food if advised by doctor.
side_effects: Headache, nausea, diarrhea, constipation, or abdominal pain.
warnings: Long-term use should be monitored by a doctor.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to rabeprazole.

purpose: Used for acid reflux, GERD, gastritis, and stomach protection.
common_frequency: Usually taken before food if advised by doctor.
side_effects: Headache, nausea, diarrhea, abdominal pain, or gas.
warnings: Long-term use should be monitored by a doctor.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to esomeprazole.

purpose: Used for nausea, vomiting, and gastric motility problems when prescribed.
side_effects: Dry mouth, stomach cramps, headache, or dizziness.
warnings: Use carefully in heart rhythm problems or liver disease.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to domperidone or if doctor advised against it due to heart rhythm risk.

purpose: Used for nausea and vomiting when prescribed.
side_effects: Headache, constipation, dizziness, or tiredness.
warnings: Use carefully in heart rhythm problems or with medicines affecting QT interval.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to ondansetron.

purpose: Used for short-term diarrhea control when appropriate.
side_effects: Constipation, dizziness, stomach cramps, or nausea.
warnings: Do not use for bloody diarrhea, high fever, or suspected infection without medical advice.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to loperamide or if severe colitis/acute dysentery is suspected.

purpose: Used to replace fluids and electrolytes in diarrhea, vomiting, or dehydration.
common_dosage: Use as directed on packet or by doctor.
common_frequency: Follow doctor's prescription or packet directions.
side_effects: Usually well tolerated; too much may cause electrolyte imbalance.
warnings: Prepare with correct amount of clean water. Do not make overly concentrated solution.
avoid_if: Avoid if doctor has restricted fluids/salts or if severe dehydration needs urgent care.

purpose: Used for acidity, heartburn, and indigestion relief.
common_frequency: Follow doctor's prescription or packet directions.
side_effects: Constipation, diarrhea, gas, or stomach discomfort.
warnings: Separate from other medicines if advised because antacids may affect absorption.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic or if severe kidney disease unless doctor advises.

purpose: Used for wheezing, bronchospasm, and asthma/COPD symptoms when prescribed.
side_effects: Tremor, fast heartbeat, headache, nervousness, or muscle cramps.
warnings: Seek urgent help if breathing difficulty is severe or not improving.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to salbutamol.

purpose: Steroid medicine used for asthma/allergy/inflammation control when prescribed.
side_effects: Throat irritation, hoarseness, cough, or oral fungal infection with inhaled forms.
warnings: Rinse mouth after inhaled use if advised. Do not stop steroid suddenly without advice.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to budesonide.

purpose: Used to help loosen mucus in productive cough when prescribed.
side_effects: Nausea, stomach discomfort, dry mouth, or rash.
warnings: Use carefully in gastric ulcer, severe liver/kidney disease, or allergy history.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to ambroxol.

purpose: Used as an expectorant to help loosen mucus in cough.
side_effects: Nausea, vomiting, dizziness, headache, or stomach discomfort.
warnings: Drink fluids if advised. Seek care for persistent cough, fever, or breathing difficulty.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to guaifenesin.

purpose: Used for dry cough suppression when appropriate.
side_effects: Drowsiness, dizziness, nausea, or stomach discomfort.
warnings: Avoid combining with certain antidepressants unless doctor advises. Seek care for persistent cough or breathing difficulty.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic or if taking interacting medicines without advice.

purpose: Used for type 2 diabetes management when prescribed.
side_effects: Nausea, diarrhea, stomach upset, metallic taste, or weakness.
warnings: Use carefully in kidney disease. Seek help for severe weakness, breathing trouble, or unusual symptoms.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to metformin or severe kidney disease unless doctor approves.

purpose: Used for type 2 diabetes management when prescribed.
side_effects: Low blood sugar, dizziness, sweating, hunger, nausea, or headache.
warnings: Monitor for hypoglycemia. Do not skip meals if medicine requires food.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to sulfonylureas or if doctor advised against it.

purpose: Used for type 2 diabetes management when prescribed.
side_effects: Low blood sugar, sweating, dizziness, hunger, nausea, or stomach upset.
warnings: Monitor for hypoglycemia. Use carefully in kidney/liver disease.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to sulfonylureas.

purpose: Used for high blood pressure and certain heart-related conditions when prescribed.
side_effects: Ankle swelling, flushing, headache, dizziness, or tiredness.
warnings: Do not stop BP medicine suddenly without doctor advice.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to amlodipine.

purpose: Used for high blood pressure and heart/kidney protection in selected patients when prescribed.
side_effects: Dizziness, low BP, high potassium, or kidney function changes.
warnings: Use carefully in kidney disease. Avoid during pregnancy unless doctor specifically advises.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to telmisartan or during pregnancy unless medically directed.

purpose: Used for high blood pressure and kidney protection in selected patients when prescribed.
side_effects: Dizziness, tiredness, low BP, high potassium, or kidney function changes.
warnings: Avoid during pregnancy unless doctor specifically advises. Monitor kidney/potassium if advised.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to losartan.

purpose: Used for high blood pressure, angina, and heart rate control when prescribed.
side_effects: Slow heart rate, dizziness, tiredness, cold hands/feet, or sleep disturbance.
warnings: Do not stop suddenly. Use carefully in asthma, diabetes, or heart block.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic or if severe slow heart rate/heart block unless doctor advises.

purpose: Used for high blood pressure, angina, heart rate control, and selected heart conditions.
side_effects: Tiredness, dizziness, slow heartbeat, cold extremities, or sleep issues.
warnings: Do not stop suddenly. Use carefully in asthma, diabetes, or heart block.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic or if severe slow heart rate/heart block unless doctor advises.

purpose: Used for high cholesterol and cardiovascular risk reduction when prescribed.
side_effects: Muscle pain, stomach upset, headache, or liver enzyme changes.
warnings: Report unexplained muscle pain/weakness. Use carefully in liver disease.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to atorvastatin or active liver disease unless doctor advises.

purpose: Used for high cholesterol and cardiovascular risk reduction when prescribed.
side_effects: Muscle pain, headache, stomach upset, or liver enzyme changes.
warnings: Report unexplained muscle pain/weakness. Use carefully in liver or kidney disease.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to rosuvastatin or active liver disease unless doctor advises.

purpose: Antifungal used for fungal skin infections when appropriate.
common_dosage: Use only as prescribed or as directed.
side_effects: Skin burning, irritation, redness, or itching.
warnings: Avoid contact with eyes. Seek care if infection worsens or spreads.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to clotrimazole or azole antifungals.

purpose: Antifungal used for fungal infections when prescribed.
side_effects: Skin irritation for topical use; stomach upset, headache, or rash for oral use.
warnings: Oral use may require liver monitoring. Do not self-use long courses.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to terbinafine or severe liver disease unless doctor advises.

purpose: Antifungal used for fungal skin or mouth infections when prescribed.
side_effects: Local irritation, burning, itching, nausea, or taste changes depending on form.
warnings: Use carefully with interacting medicines such as blood thinners if oral/buccal form.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to miconazole.

purpose: Topical antibiotic used for certain bacterial skin infections when prescribed.
side_effects: Local burning, itching, redness, or irritation.
warnings: Use only on affected area as advised. Avoid unnecessary antibiotic use.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to mupirocin.

purpose: Antiseptic used for minor cuts, wounds, and skin disinfection.
common_frequency: Follow doctor's prescription or label directions.
side_effects: Skin irritation, burning, redness, or allergy.
warnings: Use carefully in thyroid disease, large wounds, pregnancy, or infants.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to iodine/povidone iodine.

purpose: Used for vitamin D deficiency and bone health when prescribed.
side_effects: Nausea, constipation, weakness, or high calcium symptoms if overdosed.
warnings: Avoid overdose. Use carefully in kidney stones or high calcium levels.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic or if high calcium unless doctor advises.

purpose: Used for calcium deficiency and bone health when prescribed.
side_effects: Constipation, gas, stomach upset, or high calcium if overdosed.
warnings: Separate from some medicines if advised. Avoid excess intake.
avoid_if: Avoid if high calcium, kidney stones, or severe kidney disease unless doctor advises.

purpose: Used for iron deficiency anemia and supplementation when prescribed.
side_effects: Constipation, dark stools, nausea, stomach pain, or metallic taste.
warnings: Keep away from children. Iron overdose can be dangerous.
avoid_if: Avoid if iron overload disorder or allergy unless doctor advises.

purpose: Used for vitamin B supplementation when prescribed.
side_effects: Nausea, stomach upset, headache, or yellow urine.
warnings: Do not exceed recommended dose unless advised.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to any component.

purpose: Used for vitamin C supplementation when prescribed.
side_effects: Acidity, stomach upset, nausea, or diarrhea at high doses.
warnings: Use carefully in kidney stone history or severe kidney disease.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to vitamin C products.

purpose: Used for zinc supplementation when prescribed.
side_effects: Nausea, metallic taste, stomach upset, or vomiting.
warnings: Avoid high-dose long-term use unless advised.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to zinc products.

purpose: Used for folate deficiency and pregnancy supplementation when prescribed.
side_effects: Nausea, bloating, bitter taste, or rash rarely.
warnings: Use as part of anemia evaluation when advised.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic to folic acid.

purpose: Used for hypothyroidism when prescribed.
side_effects: Fast heartbeat, sweating, weight changes, nervousness, or sleep issues if dose is high.
warnings: Take consistently as advised. Do not change dose without testing/doctor advice.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic or untreated adrenal problems unless doctor advises.

purpose: Steroid used for inflammation, allergy, asthma, and autoimmune conditions when prescribed.
side_effects: Acidity, mood changes, high sugar, weight gain, swelling, or infection risk.
warnings: Do not stop suddenly if used for more than short course. Use carefully in diabetes, BP, infection, or ulcer.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic or active untreated infection unless doctor advises.

purpose: Steroid used for inflammation, allergy, and skin irritation when prescribed.
side_effects: Skin thinning, burning, irritation, or infection risk with prolonged use.
warnings: Use thin layer only if topical. Avoid long-term use without advice.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic or untreated skin infection unless doctor advises.

purpose: Steroid used for skin inflammation/allergy when prescribed.
side_effects: Skin thinning, irritation, acne, stretch marks, or infection worsening.
warnings: Do not use strong steroid creams on face/private areas unless advised.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic or untreated fungal/bacterial skin infection unless doctor advises.

purpose: Used for abdominal cramps and intestinal spasms when prescribed.
side_effects: Dry mouth, dizziness, blurred vision, constipation, or drowsiness.
warnings: Use carefully in glaucoma, urinary retention, heart disease, or elderly patients.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic or if doctor advised against antispasmodics.

purpose: Used for abdominal cramps and spasms when prescribed.
side_effects: Dry mouth, blurred vision, constipation, dizziness, or fast heartbeat.
warnings: Use carefully in glaucoma, urinary retention, bowel obstruction, or heart problems.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic or if doctor advised against it.

purpose: Used for anxiety or panic symptoms only when prescribed.
side_effects: Drowsiness, dizziness, confusion, dependence, or breathing risk with sedatives.
warnings: Can be habit-forming. Avoid alcohol and driving. Do not stop suddenly without doctor advice.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic or if not prescribed. Use carefully in breathing problems or substance-use history.

purpose: Used for depression, anxiety, and related conditions when prescribed.
side_effects: Nausea, sleep changes, headache, sweating, or sexual side effects.
warnings: Mood changes or suicidal thoughts need urgent medical attention, especially at start or dose change.
avoid_if: Avoid if allergic or taking MAO inhibitors unless doctor directs.
